Container.Name: Vortnotes
Container.Overview: A simple Flask + SQLite notes app with attachments and multi-DB support.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web UI

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent app data root. Stores SQLite DBs, uploads, config, logs, and the Flask secret key.

Config.Name: TLS Certificates
Config.Description: Optional certificate folder for direct HTTPS. Mount read-only, then enable HTTPS in Settings > Config.

Config.Name: VORTNOTES_MIGRATE_LEGACY_APP_DATA
Config.Description: Set to 1 for one startup to copy legacy /app/dbs, /app/uploads, /app/config/config.json, backups, logs, and secret key into NOTES_DATA_DIR. Source files are left in place.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional first-run admin password bootstrap. Used only when no admin password is already configured.

Config.Name: Trust Proxy Headers
Config.Description: Set to 1 only when one trusted HTTPS reverse proxy connects to VortNotes.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set to 1 when the public URL uses HTTPS.

Config.Name: TLS Certificate
Config.Description: Optional certificate path for direct HTTPS; set with TLS Private Key.

Config.Name: TLS Private Key
Config.Description: Optional private-key path for direct HTTPS; mount it read-only.
